subject: A hulking plant-elemental creature, vine-wrapped and leaf-bodied, hunched forward with massive bough-like arms in a moonlit forest
description: A massive plant-elemental looms in the center of the frame, its body built from twisted vines, leaves, and bark with thick, knotted arms hanging forward like a gorilla's. The figure is silhouetted in deep greens and blacks, lit from behind so its mossy bulk reads as a hunched mound of foliage with shadowed limbs. Behind it, slender pale trees with sparse leaves recede into a misty moonlit forest, and a soft blue-green glow filters through the canopy. The mood is brooding and primeval — a slow-moving forest titan rather than an active threat.
foreground: vine-wrapped plant elemental with bough-like arms, leafy bulk, mossy bark hide
background: misty moonlit forest with pale slender trees and a cool blue-green glow through the canopy
